description: The values and principles that drive everything we do.

items.title: Growth Mindset
items.description: We invest in learning and encourage experimentation at every level.

items.title: Radical Transparency
items.description: Open communication and honest feedback are the foundation of our team.

items.title: Customer Obsession
items.description: Every decision starts with understanding what our customers truly need.

items.title: Work-Life Harmony
items.description: Flexible schedules, remote-first, and unlimited PTO because we trust our team.
